database.label: Database
database.description: Supports Zotero and Juris-M. Alternatively a custom port number can be specified.

portNumber.label: Port number
portNumber.description: If a custom port number has been set in Zotero, enter it here.

noteImportLocation.label: Note Import Location
noteImportLocation.description: Notes imported from Zotero will be added to this folder in your vault

globalImportFilter.label: Global Import Filter
globalImportFilter.description: Remove illegal characters (/, :, ?, *, <, >, |, \) from Zotero item titles when using them as filenames.

openAfterImport.label: Open the created or updated note(s) after import
openAfterImport.description: The created or updated markdown files resulting from the import will be automatically opened.

whichNotesToOpen.label: Which notes to open after import
whichNotesToOpen.description: Open either the first note imported, the last note imported, or all notes in new tabs.

annotationConcatenation.label: Enable Annotation Concatenation
annotationConcatenation.description: Annotations extracted from PDFs that begin with '+' will be appended to the previous annotation. Note: Annotation ordering is not always consistent and you may not always achieve the desired concatenation result

autoTrigger.label: Auto-trigger AI Summary
autoTrigger.description: Automatically trigger AI summary when opening a note with anchor and PDF link.

maxPages.label: Max Pages
maxPages.description: Limit PDF reading to first N pages

triggerAnchor.label: Trigger Anchor
triggerAnchor.description: Text in note that triggers AI summary (must also have PDF link)

prompt.label: AI Prompt
prompt.description: Customize the prompt sent to the AI model.

import.heading: Import Formats & Import Here
import.name: Name
import.outputPathDescription: The file path of the exported markdown. Supports templating, eg {{citekey}}.md. Templates have access to data from the Zotero item and its first attachment.
import.imageOutputPathDescription: The folder in which images should be saved. Supports templating, eg Assets/{{citekey}}/. Templates have access to data from the Zotero item and its first attachment.
import.imageBaseNameDescription: The base file name of exported images. Eg. image will result in image-1-x123-y456.jpg where 1 is the page number and x123 and y456 are the x and y coordinates of rectangle annotation on the page. Supports templating. Templates have access to data from the Zotero item and its first attachment.
import.bibliographyStyleDescription: Note, the chosen style must be installed in Zotero. See Zotero: Citation Styles

image.heading: Import Image Settings
image.description: Rectangle annotations will be extracted from PDFs as images.

ocr.label: Image OCR
ocr.description: Attempt to extract text from images created by rectangle annotations. This requires that tesseract be installed on your system. Tesseract can be installed from homebrew on mac, various linux package managers, and from here on windows.

tesseractPath.label: Tesseract path
tesseractPath.description: Required: An absolute path to the tesseract executable. This can be found on mac and linux with the terminal command

ocrLanguage.label: Image OCR Language
ocrLanguage.description: Optional: defaults to english. Multiple languages can be specified like so: eng+deu. Each language must be installed on your system.

tesseractDataDir.label: Tesseract data directory
tesseractDataDir.description: Optional: supply an absolute path to the directory where tesseract's language files reside. This folder should include *.traineddata files for your selected languages.

pdf.heading: PDF Utility
pdf.description: Extracting data from PDFs requires an external tool. This plugin will still work without it, but annotations will not be included in exports.
pdf.upToDate: PDF utility is up to date.

pathOverride.label: PDF Utility Path Override
pathOverride.description: Override the path to the PDF utility. Specify an absolute path to the pdfannots2json executable.

messages.downloadError: Error downloading PDF utility. Check the console for more details.
messages.tesseractNotFound: Unable to find tesseract on your system. If it is installed, please manually enter a path.

notices.importHereNotConfigured: Import Here format is not configured.
notices.updateLibraryNoteNotConfigured: Update Library Note format is not configured.
notices.pleaseOpenMarkdownFile: Please open a markdown file to trigger AI Summary
notices.updatingPdfUtility: Updating Obsidian Zotero Integration PDF Utility...
notices.couldNotFindLibrary: Could not find library for citekey: {{citekey}}
